error_signature: flow stops listening after first call to webhook
title: Webhook flow stops listening after first call
symptom: The workflow stops listening after the first call to the webhook, even when set to active.
root_cause: The webhook node requires the workflow to be deactivated before making changes to the URL settings. If changes are made while the workflow is active, they may not take effect, causing the workflow to stop listening after the first call.
fix_steps: Make the necessary edits to the webhook settings
Use the production URL for subsequent calls
agent_instruction: Deactivate the workflow, edit the webhook settings, and then reactivate it.
